props.name: hue
props.description: The base hue for the orb (in degrees).

props.name: hoverIntensity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the hover distortion effect.

props.name: rotateOnHover
props.description: Toggle to enable or disable continuous rotation on hover.

props.name: forceHoverState
props.description: Force hover animations even when the orb is not actually hovered.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: The background color of the container.
